input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.16.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.16.3
            TITLE: cost event scores may be awarded in areas including, but not limited to:

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.16.3: Cost Event Scores may be awarded in areas including, but not limited to:
S.3.16.3 Cost Event Scores may be awarded in areas including, but not limited to:   
• Price Score    
• Discussion Score   
• Scenario Score

final_answer: Cost Event Scores may be awarded in areas including, but not limited to: • Price Score • Discussion Score • Scenario Score
